verdict: Radha Beauty's serum balances retinol with hydrating hyaluronic acid and soothing aloe, creating a well-rounded night treatment. The inclusion of complementary actives makes it effective for combination skin without excessive irritation potential.

_research.name: Retinol Brightening Night Serum
_research.con: Hyaluronic acid efficacy depends on humectant presence in subsequent moisturizer layer.
